message:
feat(beads): Finalize HTML export redesign plan with comprehensive details

Added:
- khh6: Task 4.5 - Migrate 29 existing tests (renderer.rs + template.rs)

Enhanced with detailed notes:
- 27t2 (Task 3): Popover content specification (header, input, output, footer)
- 1v5c (Task 3.5): Search integration, print mode, mobile touch handling
- 1nk5 (Task 4): Metadata counts, CLI flags, OpenCode handling, error fallback
- ab1y (Task 5): Search match styling, print badge expansion, overflow state

Final structure (12 beads):
- 1 Epic (2jxn)
- 11 Tasks with proper dependencies
- 3 ready to start (x399, ehsd can run in parallel)
- 9 blocked awaiting dependencies

Critical path: x399 → 1c6z → 27t2 → 1v5c → 1nk5 → khh6 → 2ebr → 1ihb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
